zh.lifeSummary: Nest Annest Agnes Gwenllian Verch Rhys於大約1148年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特。她和Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1236年在威爾士丹比爾馬斯 爾 武昌享年89歲，埋葬在威爾士丹比爾伯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Nest Annest Agnes Gwenllian Verch Rhys于大约1148年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特。她和Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1236年在威尔士丹比爾馬斯 爾 武昌享年89岁，埋葬在威尔士丹比爾伯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: Nest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

nameMeanings.name: Annest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Annis  .

variants.name: Annis
meanings: and English: a medieval vernacular form of   Agnes  , which gave rise to a surname. Its modern use as a given name is probably at least in part a transferred use of the surname as well as a revival of the medieval given name.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: Nest Annest Agnes Gwenllian Verch Rhys was born about 1148, in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules. She died in 1236, in Maes Yr Uchan, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 89, and was buried in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Nest Annest Agnes Gwenllian Verch Rhys est née environ 1148, à Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules. Elle est décédée en 1236, à Maes Yr Uchan, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Burton, Denbighshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Nest Annest Agnes Gwenllian Verch Rhys wurde um 1148 in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1236 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Maes Yr Uchan, Denbighshire, Wales und wurde in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Nest Annest Agnes Gwenllian Verch Rhys è nata il circa 1148 nel Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules. Morì nel 1236, nel Maes Yr Uchan, Denbighshire, Galles, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Burton, Denbighshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Nest Annest Agnes Gwenllian Verch Rhysは約1148年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランディフエイサントで生まれた。彼女はEdnyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dulesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1236年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアメイス イル ウチャンで89歳で死去し，ウェールズデンビグhシュアイアブルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nest Annest Agnes Gwenllian Verch Rhys(은)는 대략 1148년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜디프이산트에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1236년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 메이스 이르 챈에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 덴비그h실르 버턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Nest Annest Agnes Gwenllian Verch Rhys nasceu aproximadamente 1148, em Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules. Ela faleceu em 1236, em Maes Yr Uchan, Denbighshire, Gales, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Burton, Denbighshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Nest Annest Agnes Gwenllian Verch Rhys родилась около 1148 г. в местности лландифисант, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules. Она умерла в 1236 г. в местности мэесь ир учань, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности буртон, денбаишир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Nest Annest Agnes Gwenllian Verch Rhys nació aproximadamente 1148, en Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules. Murió en 1236, en Maes Yr Uchan, Denbighshire, Gales, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Burton, Denbighshire, Gales.
